sections.paragraph:
ρῆμα (ρῆμα, ατος, τό,)
Etym. ρέω, ἐρῶ

I. that which is said or spoken, a word, saying, Theogn., Hdt., etc.; κατὰ ρῆμα word for word, Aeschin.

2. a phrase, opp. to ὄνομα (a single word), Plat.

3. the subject of speech, a thing, NTest.

II. in Gramm., a verb, opp. to ὄνομα (a noun), ρήματα καὶ ὀνόματα Plat.
